title: Build Luna's Kitchen — Mexican Takeout Restaurant Website

requirements.text: Completely rebuild the site for Luna's Kitchen. Replace all Eatery Burns Lake content, branding, and styling. Apply a warm, vibrant Mexican street-food visual theme with a bold color palette of deep red, orange, black, and cream. Use modern typography with authentic Mexican-inspired accents. Update the HTML title to 'Luna's Kitchen – Best Tacos in Los Lunas NM'. The site should be a single-page layout (no sub-routes needed) with a sticky header showing the Luna's Kitchen logo/name and a 'Call Now' nav button linking to tel:+15054884886. Remove all Eatery Burns Lake pages and routing.

quotes: Create a modern, mobile-friendly website for a takeout restaurant called Luna's Kitchen
Bold colors (deep red, orange, black, cream)
Modern typography with authentic Mexican-inspired accents

acceptanceCriteria: All Eatery Burns Lake branding is removed
Color palette uses deep red, orange, black, and cream tones
HTML title reads 'Luna's Kitchen – Best Tacos in Los Lunas NM'
Sticky header shows Luna's Kitchen name/logo and a Call Now button

requirements.text: Build a full-screen Hero section at the top of the page using the generated hero background image (lunas-hero-bg.dim_1440x800.jpg). Display the headline 'Authentic Flavor. Fresh Ingredients. Made with Love.' and subheadline 'Los Lunas' Favorite Spot for Tacos, Burritos & Burgers.' Include three CTA buttons: 'Call Now' linking to tel:+15054884886, 'Get Directions' linking to https://maps.google.com/?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031, and 'Order Takeout' (styled as a future-ready placeholder button).

quotes: Headline: "Authentic Flavor. Fresh Ingredients. Made with Love."
Subheadline: "Los Lunas' Favorite Spot for Tacos, Burritos & Burgers."

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section fills the full viewport height
Hero background image is displayed
Headline and subheadline text are correct
Call Now button triggers tel:+15054884886
Get Directions button links to Google Maps for the correct address
Order Takeout button is present and styled

requirements.text: Build an About section with a heading such as 'Our Story' and a short story-style paragraph describing Luna's Kitchen as a locally loved takeout restaurant in Los Lunas, New Mexico, known for bold authentic Mexican flavors, fresh daily ingredients, and warm friendly service. Mention it is a community favorite and a go-to spot for tacos, burritos, and more.

quotes: About Section Write a short story-style paragraph describing Luna's Kitchen as a locally loved takeout restaurant known for bold flavors, fresh ingredients, and friendly service.

acceptanceCriteria: About section is present on the page
Contains a story-style paragraph mentioning Luna's Kitchen, Los Lunas NM, bold flavors, fresh ingredients, and friendly service

requirements.text: Build a Featured Menu section with the heading 'Featured Menu' or 'Our Favorites'. Display six visually attractive food cards using the generated food card images (lunas-menu-tacos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burritos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-quesadillas.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-quesabirria.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-tacoburger.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burgers.dim_600x400.jpg) for the following items with short appetizing descriptions: (1) Quesabirria Tacos — 'Slow-braised beef birria, melty cheese, consommé dipping broth. A true Mexican classic.'; (2) Tacos — 'Seasoned meats, fresh cilantro, onion, and a squeeze of lime on warm tortillas.'; (3) Burritos — 'Stuffed with rice, beans, cheese, and your choice of protein. Big flavors, big portions.'; (4) Quesadillas — 'Golden, crispy tortillas filled with melted cheese and savory toppings.'; (5) Tacoburger — 'Where the taco meets the burger — bold, juicy, and totally unique to Luna's Kitchen.'; (6) Burgers — 'Handcrafted beef burgers with fresh toppings and house-made sauces.'

quotes: Add short appetizing descriptions for each item.

acceptanceCriteria: Six food cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows a food image, item name, and appetizing description
All six items are present: Quesabirria Tacos, Tacos, Burritos, Quesadillas, Tacoburger, Burgers

requirements.text: Build a 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting five key selling points with icons: ⭐ 4.9-star customer rating (137 reviews), 💲 Affordable pricing – $10–20 per person, 🚀 Fast takeout service, 🌿 Fresh ingredients used daily, and 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family-friendly atmosphere.
acceptanceCriteria: Section heading 'Why Choose Us' or similar is present
All five highlights are displayed with icons
4.9 stars and 137 reviews are mentioned
Price range $10–20 is mentioned

requirements.text: Build a Reviews section displaying three sample customer testimonials. Each testimonial should include a customer name, star rating (5 stars), and a review quote. Sample reviews: (1) 'Maria G.' — 'The quesabirria tacos are absolutely incredible! The consommé is so flavorful. Best Mexican food in Los Lunas by far!'; (2) 'James R.' — 'Huge portions, amazing prices. The burritos are stuffed to the brim and taste homemade. We come here every week!'; (3) 'Sofia L.' — 'Super friendly staff and the food is always fresh. The tacoburger is something you have to try — completely unique!'

quotes: Reviews Section Display sample customer testimonials highlighting great flavor, generous portions, and friendly service.

acceptanceCriteria: Reviews section is present with at least three testimonials
Each testimonial shows customer name, star rating, and review text
Reviews mention flavor, portions, and friendly service

requirements.text: Build a Location & Hours section with the heading 'Find Us'. Display the address '📍 3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031, United States', the phone number '📞 +1 505-488-4886' as a clickable tel:+15054884886 link, and business hours showing 'Opens at 9:00 AM' with a 'Closed now' status indicator. Include an embedded Google Maps iframe pointing to the address (3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031). The map iframe src should use: https://maps.google.com/maps?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031&output=embed

quotes: Display business hours with "Opens at 9:00 AM" status

acceptanceCriteria: Address 3470 NM-47, Los Lunas, NM 87031 is displayed
Phone number is a clickable tel:+15054884886 link
Business hours show Opens at 9:00 AM with Closed now status
Google Maps iframe is embedded and visible

requirements.text: Build a Call-to-Action Footer section just above the site footer with the heading 'Craving Authentic Mexican Flavor?' and a subtext prompt like 'Come visit us or call ahead for fast, fresh takeout.' Include two buttons: 'Call Now' linking to tel:+15054884886 and 'Get Directions' linking to https://maps.google.com/?q=3470+NM-47,+Los+Lunas,+NM+87031. Below this, render the main site footer with social media icon links (Facebook, Instagram — placeholder hrefs), a copyright line '© 2024 Luna's Kitchen. All rights reserved.', and the address in small text.

quotes: Include social media icons and copyright footer.

acceptanceCriteria: CTA section heading 'Craving Authentic Mexican Flavor?' is present
Call Now button triggers tel:+15054884886
Get Directions button links to Google Maps
Footer includes Facebook and Instagram social icons
Copyright notice is present

requirements.text: Render the generated hero background image (lunas-hero-bg.dim_1440x800.jpg) and the six food card images (lunas-menu-quesabirria.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-tacos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burritos.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-quesadillas.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-tacoburger.dim_600x400.jpg, lunas-menu-burgers.dim_600x400.jpg) and the restaurant logo (lunas-logo.dim_300x300.png) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated. Use the hero image in the Hero section, the food images in the Featured Menu cards, and the logo in the site header.

quotes: Large background image of tacos or quesabirria

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is rendered in the Hero section
Each of the six food cards displays its corresponding image
Luna's Kitchen logo appears in the site header

constraints: Do not build AI chatbot features
Do not implement actual online ordering — Order Takeout button should be present but styled as a future-ready placeholder
All Eatery Burns Lake content, routes, and branding must be fully replaced
nonGoals: Backend data persistence or Motoko changes
Multi-page routing — this is a single-page site

required: Vibrant close-up hero photo of quesabirria tacos with consommé dipping broth, warm orange-red lighting, rustic wooden table, steam rising, appetizing street-food atmosphere (lunas-hero-bg.dim_1440x800.jpg)
Luna's Kitchen circular logo with bold Mexican-inspired typography, deep red and orange colors, cream background, taco or pepper icon accent (lunas-logo.dim_300x300.png)
Close-up food photo of quesabirria tacos with melted cheese and consommé broth bowl, vibrant warm tones (lunas-menu-quesabirria.dim_600x400.jpg)
Close-up food photo of two street tacos with cilantro, onion, lime wedge on a warm wooden surface (lunas-menu-tacos.dim_600x400.jpg)
Close-up food photo of a large burrito stuffed with rice and beans, cut in half showing filling, warm tones (lunas-menu-burritos.dim_600x400.jpg)
Close-up food photo of a golden crispy quesadilla cut into wedges with a side of salsa, appetizing presentation (lunas-menu-quesadillas.dim_600x400.jpg)
Close-up food photo of a tacoburger — a beef burger patty served in a taco shell with fresh toppings, bold and colorful presentation (lunas-menu-tacoburger.dim_600x400.jpg)
Close-up food photo of a juicy handcrafted beef burger with fresh lettuce, tomato, and sauce on a brioche bun, warm lighting (lunas-menu-burgers.dim_600x400.jpg)
